name: translation-quote-system
description: 翻译报价系统 - Electron 版本

scripts.build-flask: cd app && python -m PyInstaller --onefile --name flask_server --add-data "quote_system/templates;quote_system/templates" --add-data "quote_system/static;quote_system/static" --add-data "config;config" --add-data "模板;模板" --hidden-import quote_system.web_app --hidden-import quote_system.generator --hidden-import quote_system.memoq_html --hidden-import quote_system.projects --hidden-import quote_system.config --hidden-import quote_system.save_path_config --hidden-import quote_system.paths --hidden-import quote_system.feishu_client --hidden-import quote_system.auto_quote --hidden-import quote_system.auto_quote_zhan_shuang --hidden-import quote_system.auto_quote_zhan_shuang_feishu --hidden-import quote_system.auto_quote_4399 --hidden-import quote_system.auto_quote_diezhi --hidden-import quote_system.auto_fill_tk --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement_mamian --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement_zhan_shuang --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement_zhan_shuang_faxing --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement_4399 --hidden-import settlement.generate_settlement_diezhi --hidden-import settlement.settlement_tracker --hidden-import lxml --hidden-import openpyxl --hidden-import docx --distpath ../dist/flask_build --workpath ../dist/flask_work -y run_flask.py
